snippet: For advice on any issues relating to human rights and discrimination law, Victorian government school principals can contact the Legal Division: Legal Division 03 9637 3146 legal.services@education.vic.gov.au Other contacts relevant to this topic are: Inclusive Education Division disability.inclusion@education.vic.gov.au Safe Schools 03 9637 3699 or 03 9637 3690 safe.schools@education.vic.gov.au
